title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Bank Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Bank Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the HDFC Bank Global Group family as a Risk Analyst in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About HDFC Bank Global Group:
HDFC Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
